Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core
Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.audio

Interface FlixelSoundBackend.EffectNode

Enclosing interface:
FlixelSoundBackend
public static interface FlixelSoundBackend.EffectNode
An opaque handle to an audio-graph effect node (reverb, delay, low-pass, etc.).

On platforms that do not support an audio graph (e.g. TeaVM) the returned instances are no-op stubs.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    attachToUpstream(FlixelSoundBackend upstream, int bus)
    Wires an upstream source into this node.
    void
    detach(int bus)
    Detaches this node from its input bus.
    void
    dispose()
    Releases native resources held by this effect node.

  • Method Details

    • attachToUpstream

      void attachToUpstream(FlixelSoundBackend upstream, int bus)
      Wires an upstream source into this node.
      Parameters:
      upstream - The upstream sound or node output.
      bus - Input bus index (typically 0).

    • detach

      void detach(int bus)
      Detaches this node from its input bus.
      Parameters:
      bus - The bus index to detach.

    • dispose

      void dispose()
      Releases native resources held by this effect node.
